text:

> >Description:
> Seems there're no good configuration file
> to re-define MASTER_SITE_* without make
> changes in bsd.sites.mk.

Uh.. you do know that you can override MASTER_SITE_* in your
/etc/make.conf file, right?

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
This sentence is false.
